paragraph: Emerson's single-family market is running hot right now. Thirty-five homes sold over the last eight months at a median of $825,000, with nearly two-thirds of them closing above asking price. The sale-to-list ratio sits at 1.03, meaning homes are fetching their price or better, and the median time on market is 16 days. That's a real seller's market. Sellers aren't under pressure to discount, and you're seeing multiple offer situations on homes that are priced right. The range is broad, from $520,000 to $1,240,000, so there's inventory across price points, but the speed at which homes are moving tells you that if you're shopping here, you need to be ready to move fast and you're probably going to face competition. If you're selling, you have leverage right now. If you're buying, you'll want to get your financing lined up and know exactly what you're looking for before you tour.
